page.title: Account
page.subtitle: Manage your profile, password, and two-factor authentication.

twoFactor.title: Two-factor authentication
twoFactor.descEnabled: Your account is protected with an authenticator app. You’ll be asked for a code when you sign in.
twoFactor.descDisabled: Add a second step to sign-in using an authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, 1Password, …).

enable.title: Enable two-factor authentication
enable.description: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app, then enter the 6-digit code to confirm.

recovery.title: Save your recovery codes
recovery.description: Each code works once if you lose your authenticator. Store them somewhere safe — they won’t be shown again.

disable.title: Disable two-factor authentication
disable.description: Confirm your password to turn off 2FA. Your account will be less protected.

toast.passwordChangedDetail: Use your new password next time you sign in.
